description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise lounge, upholstered in a textured gray fabric. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, providing a clean and contemporary silhouette. The sofa is supported by slender, exposed metal legs at each corner, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery has a subtle woven pattern, adding visual interest and a tactile quality to the surface. This piece is well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, communal lounges, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with a left chaise, boxy armrests, and slender metal legs. The upholstery features a subtle woven texture and three uniform seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, boxy armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the armrests and back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the right armrest and the length of the main seating section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose, and uniform seat cushions with three matching back cushions, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests of equal height to the backrest, with a clean and modern profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, exposed metal legs positioned at the corners, with a simple and modern design, slightly elevating the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three loose, uniform cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle woven texture in a solid gray color, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
